response.justification: Exceptional full-stack engineer with 13+ years of hands-on experience across web, mobile, desktop, and backend systems. Currently at Staff level with direct expertise in AI agent infrastructure—a key job requirement. Strong demonstrated match on TypeScript, Node.js, React, databases (MongoDB, SQL, MySQL), cloud platforms (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes), and TDD practices. Primary concerns: no explicit mention of Nest.js, Vitest, or Playwright—the specific tools in the job description; no documented security/auth expertise despite lengthy career; very recent role change (2 months) to current position. These appear to be documentation gaps rather than capability gaps and are clarifiable in conversation.
strengths: 13+ years full-stack experience with proven high-impact delivery: built top-10 US Apple TV app, optimized pricing systems at scale (millions of transactions), built low-latency microservices handling millions of requests/second
Current AI agent infrastructure expertise at Staff level directly addresses job's explicit AI development requirement; demonstrates cutting-edge relevance and ongoing technical leadership

Strong software craftsmanship foundation: TDD and pairing practitioner (RIDE Capital), open-source library creator, workshop instructor on testing and web internals, experience at major engineering organizations (National Instruments, Dunnhumby, RIDE Capital)
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js, Vitest, or Playwright despite extensive Node.js and testing experience; unclear if familiar with these specific modern tools listed as primary stack

Security and authentication expertise not documented despite 13+ years in roles involving financial systems (RIDE Capital) and large-scale data infrastructure (Dunnhumby); required skill with zero resume evidence
Very recent role change (2 months at re:cinq) following 3.25 years at Optilyz; pattern of 1–3 year senior tenures raises questions about role stability and long-term fit

key_factors.factor: Current AI agent infrastructure expertise at Staff level
Full-stack breadth with proven impact (TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, databases)
Security/auth expertise not documented in 13+ year career
